name: Alfred F. Jones (America)
description:
America from Hetalia. Requested by: Gioerborea

Creator’s Note: He’s the hero! As always, character definition is based on canon, fanon, and some headcanon sprinkled in. Notable relationships includes mention of my OC, Dyrland. Notable relationships will be updated at a later point, there’s no way I can include everything! Example dialogues are a WIP.

EDIT 5/15/25: First of my bots to reach 100k! 🎉

EDIT 10/22/25: 200k reached! Added in his love for holidays yesterday.

Songs that came to mind as I made this: Bang Bang - K’NAAN ft Adam Levine

Classic - MKTO

(Bonus Awesome Trio vibes) Bad Word - Panicland
